mnemonics: P.I.C.K. L.E.S.S. - Pandas I/O Creates Knowledge, Leverage Efficient Storage Systems
keyPoints: Use pandas.read_csv() and .to_csv() for most tabular data tasks
The 'open()' function with context managers ('with' statement) is fundamental for raw file handling
Understand the difference between text mode ('t') and binary mode ('b') when opening files
commonMistakes: Forgetting to close a file opened with open(), leading to memory leaks (use context managers)
Assuming the file path is relative to the script location instead of the current working directory
Using the wrong delimiter or encoding when reading a text file, causing parsing errors
